author: mark
text:
Add --tasks-dir for custom stealth task storage

bl init --tasks-dir /path stores tasks at a user-chosen absolute
path instead of the auto-generated hash location. Implies stealth.
Validation rejects relative paths. Three new integration tests
cover the happy path, stealth implication, and relative-path
rejection.

Also removes the dead config.tasks_dir field that was declared in
Config but never read by any code path. README updated.
